dvids.title: USS Pinckney (DDG 91) supports Operation Epic Fury
dvids.desc: Arleigh Burke-class guided-missile destroyer USS Pinckney (DDG 91) fires a Tomahawk Land Attack Missile (TLAM) during Operation Epic Fury. (U.S. Navy video)

dvids.title: USS Milius Supports Operation Epic Fury
dvids.desc: U.S. Navy Arleigh Burke-class guided-missile destroyer USS Milius (DDG 69) fires Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles during Operation Epic Fury. (U.S. Navy video)

dvids.title: UCT One Transfers Expeditionary Engineering Mission from Dive Detachment Bravo to Charlie
dvids.desc: Underwater Construction Team (UCT) One formally transferred responsibility for its expeditionary engineering mission in the U.S. 6th Fleet area of operations from Construction Dive Detachment (CDD) Bravo to Construction Dive Detachment (CDD) Charlie during a transfer of authority ceremony at Naval S

dvids.title: USS Gerald R. Ford supports Operation Epic Fury
dvids.desc: USS Gerald R. Ford (CVN 78) conducts flight operations in support of Operation Epic Fury March 15, 2026. Operation Epic Fury involves the largest regional concentration of American military firepower in a generation. (U.S. Navy Video)

dvids.title: CENTCOM Commander Provides Update on Operation Epic Fury
dvids.desc: U.S. Navy Adm. Brad Cooper, commander of CENTCOM, provides an update on Operation Epic Fury, March 16, 2026. (U.S. Central Command Video)
